action.reasoning: Observation: The current model achieved a mean R² of -1371.20, which is worse than our previous best of -526.47. The model is still struggling with humidity prediction (R² of -3165.05), though temperature (0.5277) and radiation (0.9136) are performing reasonably well. The simplified architecture didn't improve performance compared to our best model. Analysis: Our best performance came from iteration 10 with the weighted R2 loss function, achieving a mean R² of -526.47. The subsequent attempts to simplify the architecture or add complexity haven't yielded improvements. The main issue remains the poor humidity prediction. Decision: I'll go back to the architecture from iteration 10 (which used the weighted R2 loss) and make targeted improvements to address the humidity prediction specifically. I'll increase the capacity of the humidity head and potentially adjust the weighting in the loss function.
